title: Johnson Controls (JCI) to Provide Nozomi Solutions to Customers
text: Johnson Controls (JCI) signs a framework agreement with Nozomi Networks to offer customers with the latter's cybersecurity solutions.

title: 2 Industrial Stocks to Buy Before the Bear Market Is Over
text: Industrial stocks can be some of the hardest hit during a bear market. They can also be the best performers in an ensuing bull market.

title: Johnson Controls Invests in Nozomi Networks and Signs Framework Agreement for Providing Nozomi Networks Cybersecurity Services
text: Investment reinforces Johnson Controls' commitment to best-of-breed cybersecurity for smart buildings, facilities automation and managed services CORK, Ireland and SAN FRANCISCO , Aug. 25, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Johnson Controls (NYSE: JCI), the global leader for smart, healthy and sustainable buildings, and Nozomi Networks, a leader in operational technology (OT) and Internet of Things (IoT) security today announced that Johnson Controls signed a framework agreement with Nozomi Networks, allowing Johnson Controls to utilize the Nozomi Networks toolset for the benefit of its customers. Johnson Controls also participated in last year's $100 million funding round for Nozomi Networks – further signaling its commitment to deliver high quality, robust and specialized cybersecurity solutions for its OpenBlue secure communications stack.

title: These 3 Stocks Are Timely Buys Amid the Market Sell-Off
text: A building products and systems company, an energy equipment and services company, and an industrial powerhouse in turnaround mode are three attractive stocks.

title: Johnson Controls: Opportunity For Future Growth, But Better Options Might Exist
text: Johnson Controls remains a solid and conservatively managed company with the opportunity to capture robust future EPS growth. The current valuation appears to exceed peers and does not reflect recent challenges in growing EPS over the last five years.

title: What's Next For Johnson Controls Stock After A 20% Rise In A Month?
text: Johnson Controls stock (NYSE: JCI) reported its Q3FY22 results earlier this month, with revenue falling short and earnings aligning with the street estimates.

title: Johnson Controls Collaborates with 3Degrees to Accelerate the Race to Net Zero
text: Johnson Controls expands Renewable Services business through a partnership with leading renewable energy and decarbonization solutions provider 3Degrees Collaboration fast-tracks net zero goals through carbon reduction services Service further expands the comprehensive OpenBlue Net Zero Buildings as a Service offering MILWAUKEE , Aug. 16, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Johnson Controls (NYSE: JCI) announces its collaboration with 3Degrees, a firm that helps organizations around the world achieve renewable energy and decarbonization goals. The new collaboration aims to accelerate building owners' and operators' progress toward net zero by leveraging 3Degrees' large-scale environmental commodity solutions, including Renewable Energy Certificate (REC) transactions, long-term renewable energy procurement, carbon credit portfolio management, transportation decarbonization and climate advisory services.

title: Johnson Controls AI-enhanced OpenBlue Platform Cuts Microsoft's Beijing Campus Energy Footprint
text: Johnson Controls helps Microsoft Beijing Campus  achieve energy savings of 27.9% through continuous retrofitting and optimization, delivering on sustainable development goals Powered by Artificial Intelligence (AI), OpenBlue suite of connected solutions plays a key role in achieving lean campus management with higher energy efficiency and better user experience Professional service brings more than 98% uptime of key equipment and increase the level of operational automation SHANGHAI , Aug. 11, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Johnson Controls (NYSE: JCI), the global leader for smart, healthy and sustainable buildings, has partnered with Microsoft Beijing Campus for its ongoing retrofit and optimization of building operations, achieving 27.9% energy savings and ensuring key equipment uptime to 98%. As a result, the campus has been granted an energy saving endorsement and financial subsidy by the Beijing Municipal Government and the Haidian District Government.

title: Wall Street Thinks This Large-Cap Dividend Stock Will Grow 18% Next Year
text: The building-controls company has a substantial margin-expansion opportunity in the coming years.

title: Johnson Controls (JCI) Beats on Q3 Earnings, Revises FY'22 View
text: Johnson Controls (JCI) sees growth in top and bottom lines in the third quarter. It modifies its existing guidance for full-year 2022.

title: Johnson Controls International plc's (JCI) CEO George Oliver on Q3 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Johnson Controls International plc (NYSE:JCI ) Q3 2022 Earnings Conference Call August 4, 2022 8:30 AM ET Company Participants Michael Gates – Senior Director, Investor Relations George Oliver – Chairman and Chief Executive Officer Olivier Leonetti – Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Gautam Khanna – Cowen Steve Tusa – JPMorgan Jeff Sprague – Vertical Research Julian Mitchell – Barclays Josh Pokrzywinski – Morgan Stanley Joe Ritchie – Goldman Sachs Scott Davis – Melius Research Nigel Coe – Wolfe Research Deane Dray – RBC Capital Markets Operator Welcome to Johnson Controls Third Quarter 2022 Earnings Call. Your lines have been placed on listen-only until the question-and-answer session.

title: Initial Jobless Claims Rise, BOE Launches Biggest Rate Hike
text: Stock futures point to a flat opening today as Weekly Jobless Claims data displayed an increase.

title: Johnson Controls (JCI) Q3 Earnings Surpass Estimates
text: Johnson Controls (JCI) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 1.19% and 1.69%, respectively, for the quarter ended June 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Johnson Controls Delivers Strong Q3 Orders and on Track to Achieve Solid Full Year Revenue and EPS Growth Performance
text: GAAP EPS of $0.55; Adjusted EPS of $0.85, up 3% versus prior year Reported sales +4% versus prior year; +8% organically Strong Order momentum continues – Total Field Orders +8% year-over-year; +11% organically Record Field Backlog of $11.1 billion, increased 13% organically year-over-year Completed approximately $400 million in share repurchases in the quarter; $1.4 billion year-to-date Fiscal 2022 adjusted EPS guidance refined to $2.98 to $3.02, from $2.95 to $3.05 previously, absorbing 6 cents of FX headwinds versus our prior guide CORK, Ireland , Aug. 4, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Johnson Controls International plc (NYSE: JCI), a global leader for smart, healthy and sustainable buildings, today reported fiscal third quarter 2022 GAAP earnings per share ("EPS") from continuing operations, including special items, of $0.55. Excluding special items, adjusted EPS from continuing operations was $0.85, up 3% versus the prior year period (see attached footnotes for non-GAAP reconciliation).

title: Johnson Controls Named by Analysts as Leaders in Connected Chillers
text: Frost & Sullivan names Johnson Controls as Best Practices Customer Value Leader for 2022 Calls out leadership in areas from operational efficiency to customer service/care Conventional chillers consume up to 40% of an average building's total energy Digitally enabling a chiller system and managing it with Johnson Controls OpenBlue Services lowers chiller equipment downtime by up to 50% and minimizes energy waste, which can be as high as 30% in unmanaged chiller plants CORK, Ireland , Aug. 2, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Johnson Controls (NYSE: JCI), has been recognized by independent analyst firm Frost & Sullivan with its Best Practices Customer Value Leadership Award for 2022. The assessment, covering chiller systems in buildings in North America, pitted Johnson Controls against global peers and roundly praised the company's technology and customer service as market leading.
